name: Avocado, Roasted Mushroom, and Ham Spaghetti

ingredients.item: salt and black pepper, to taste

method: Line a baking tray with baking paper and place mushrooms on it. Spray with olive oil and season with salt and
black pepper to taste. Roast in a preheated to 375 F oven for 15 minutes, or until golden and tender.
Bring salted water to boil in a large pot and then cook spaghetti as per the directions on the package. Drain and set
In a blender, combine lemon juice, garlic, olive paste and avocados and blend until smooth.
Combine pasta, diced ham, mushrooms and avocado sauce. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and serve immediately.
One of the most popular dishes in Italy, cheese ravioli, is a soft dough wrapped around a filling of Parmesan,
ricotta, or mozzarella. The dough can be stuffed with bread crumbs and any other ingredient such as spinach or
mushrooms, which enhances the flavor of the dish.
